pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade Spring Boot parent version from 2.5.5 to 3.3.13 to align with Java 21 and Jakarta EE namespace changes.
pom.xml.why_exists: Spring Boot 2.x does not support Java 21 as a baseline and uses javax.* namespaces; Spring Boot 3.x requires Java 17+ and uses jakarta.* namespaces.

pom.xml.general_idea: Update the Java version property from 17 to 21 to target the new JDK baseline.
pom.xml.why_exists: The build configuration must reflect the target JDK version for compilation and runtime compatibility.

pom.xml.general_idea: Replace javax.inject dependency with jakarta.inject-api to match the Jakarta EE namespace migration in Spring Boot 3.
pom.xml.why_exists: The javax.inject package is removed/renamed in Jakarta EE 9+; code using @Inject will fail to compile or link if the old artifact is used with Spring Boot 3.

pom.xml.general_idea: Add jakarta.mail-api dependency to replace implicit or removed javax.mail support in Spring Boot 3.
pom.xml.why_exists: Spring Boot 3 removes javax.mail; applications sending email need the Jakarta EE equivalent API.

pom.xml.general_idea: Add jakarta.validation-api dependency to replace implicit or removed javax.validation support in Spring Boot 3.
pom.xml.why_exists: Spring Boot 3 removes javax.validation; applications using Bean Validation need the Jakarta EE equivalent API.

pom.xml.general_idea: Update MySQL connector artifact from mysql-connector-java to mysql-connector-j to align with the new Maven coordinates required by Spring Boot 3.
pom.xml.why_exists: The old artifactId 'mysql-connector-java' is deprecated/removed in newer MySQL driver versions; Spring Boot 3 expects 'mysql-connector-j'.

pom.xml.general_idea: Update spring-boot-starter-data-jpa version to match the new Spring Boot 3.3.13 parent version.
pom.xml.why_exists: Using a Spring Boot 2.x JPA starter with a Spring Boot 3.x parent causes classpath conflicts and missing Jakarta EE classes.

src/main/java/ch/rasc/eds/starter/config.general_idea: Migrate servlet API imports from javax to jakarta namespace.
src/main/java/ch/rasc/eds/starter/config.why_exists: javax.servlet classes are removed in Jakarta EE 9+ (Spring Boot 3.x), causing compile errors.

src/main/java/ch/rasc/eds/starter/config.why_exists: javax.persistence package is removed in Jakarta EE 9+ (Spring Boot 3.x), causing a compile error 'package javax.persistence does not exist'.

src/main/java/ch/rasc/eds/starter/servic.why_exists: Compile error: constructor Locale(String) is deprecated for removal in Java 21.

src/main/java/ch/rasc/eds/starter/util/V.why_exists: Compile error: package javax.validation does not exist in Jakarta EE 9+ environments; classes must be imported from jakarta.validation.

src/main/java/ch/rasc/eds/starter/web/Cs.general_idea: Migrate servlet API import from javax to jakarta namespace to comply with Jakarta EE 9+ standards required by Spring Boot 3.x and Java 21.
src/main/java/ch/rasc/eds/starter/web/Cs.why_exists: Compile error: package javax.servlet.http does not exist in Jakarta EE 9+ environments; the class HttpServletRequest must be imported from jakarta.servlet.http.

src/main/java/ch/rasc/eds/starter/web/QR.general_idea: Replace javax.servlet imports with jakarta.servlet to align with Spring Boot 3.x and Jakarta EE 9+ namespace changes.
src/main/java/ch/rasc/eds/starter/web/QR.why_exists: javax.servlet classes are no longer available in Spring Boot 3.x; using them causes a compile error (class not found).

src/main/resources/application.yml.general_idea: Replace deprecated `server.use-forward-headers` with `server.forward-headers-strategy` for Spring Boot 3.x compatibility.
src/main/resources/application.yml.why_exists: The property `server.use-forward-headers` was removed in Spring Boot 3.x; using it results in a configuration binding error or ignored setting.

src/main/resources/application.yml.general_idea: Replace deprecated `logging.file` with `logging.file.name` for Spring Boot 3.x compatibility.
src/main/resources/application.yml.why_exists: The property `logging.file` was removed in Spring Boot 3.x; using it results in a configuration binding error.
